cart.title: Artifact Satchel
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Prithee summon a treasury address to continue thy conjuration.
cart.howToPay: How dost thou wish to pay tribute?
cart.addCardPrompt: To summon a payment rune, prithee click upon the Summon New Payment Rune button.
cart.allUpToDate: Thou art fully up to date!
cart.thankYouForOrder: The guild thanks thee for thy conjuration.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Prithee render the tribute for service awakening. When tribute is received, thy service shall be immediately awakened.
cart.bankPaymentNote: After tribute is rendered, open a magical parchment with the transaction rune, date, and gold amount paid. We shall manually credit the payment.

creditCard.name: True Name
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification is required before thy payment rune is available for use. InterServer shall charge thy payment rune with two amounts under 1 gold piece each.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges shall appear on thy treasury statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If thou dost not see these charges, prithee contact thy payment rune issuer for more details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are solely for verification purposes and shall be voided within 3-5 days, depending on thy vault.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under 1 gold piece each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Enter thy payment rune's vault portal or call thy vault keeper to verify the two amounts charged. They often appear under Pending Charges with thy vault. These authorization charges shall vanish in about 3-5 days depending on thy vault.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Prithee enter the two amounts charged to thy payment rune. The values must be in gold pieces (USD).
creditCard.currencyNote: Prithee note that the charges on thy payment rune statement may be in a different coin type from the one required on the last confirmation parchment described above. If thy payment rune statement doth not display the original transaction amounts in the required coin type, thou shalt need to contact thy payment rune guild. They should be able to tell thee the amounts of the two charges in the original coin type.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to dismiss thy payment rune {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This rune hath been authenticated and enchanted for use in our system.
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Click here to enchant this payment rune for use.

paymentSuccess.title: Tribute Accepted
paymentSuccess.thankYou: The guild thanks thee for thy tribute. Thy transaction hath been completed successfully.

paymentTypes.title: Tribute Types
paymentTypes.ccNote: All payment runes must be verified before use. To verify them, click the "Verify" button.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to banish thy debt scroll {id}?

prepays.title: Pre-deposited Essence
prepays.noHistoryFound: No history found in the crystal ball!
prepays.showingPage: Showing parchment {page} of {totalPages} and {records} records out of {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Automatically apply to new debt scrolls
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to banish thy pre-deposited essence #{id} and its related history?
